content.text:
<user_query>
Find all files related to the hero section or landing page in the frontend. Look for:
1. Any component with "hero" in the name
2. Any component with "landing" in the name
3. The main page component that renders the "Meet BIQc" / "Soundboard" tabs shown on the landing page
4. Any component related to the "How BIQc works" content

Search in the frontend/src directory. Return the full file paths and a brief description of what each file does.
</user_query>
Let me search for files related to the hero section, landing page, and related components in the frontend/src directory.

Here are all the files related to the hero section / landing page in the frontend:

---

## Main Landing / Home Pages

### 1. `frontend/src/pages/website/HomePage.js` — **Active Home Page (route: `/`)**
This is the **current main landing page** rendered at the root URL `/`. It composes the full homepage using `WebsiteLayout` and imports all the key sub-components: `LiquidSteelHeroRotator` (hero), `IntegrationCarousel`, `IntelligenceDiagram`, and `HowItWorks`. Sections include: Hero, AI Era stats, How It Works, Intelligence Architecture, Integrations, Trust Badges, Cognition Delivers, Testimonials, and CTA.

### 2. `frontend/src/pages/LandingIntelligent.js` — **Alternate Landing Page (route: `/landing-intelligent`)**
An older/alternate landing page with a white background, typewriter animation, connection diagram, and the "Meet BIQc.." section with a "Soundboard" concept. Contains its own nav, hero with typewriter phrases, feature grid, pricing plans, and trust signals. Not the active homepage but still routed.

### 3. `frontend/src/pages/Landing.js` — **Legacy Landing Page (not currently routed)**
A simpler, light-themed landing page with a "Your Personalised Business Soundboard" headline. Contains features grid, pricing plans, and CTA sections. Not connected to any active route in `App.js` — appears to be a predecessor to `LandingIntelligent.js`.

### 4. `frontend/src/pages/website/TrustLandingPage.js` — **Trust Landing Page (route: `/trust`)**
A dedicated landing page for the Trust & Security section. Has its own hero ("Built for Businesses That Take Data Seriously") with Australian sovereign hosting details, security infrastructure, and links to legal documents.

---

## Hero Components

### 5. `frontend/src/components/website/LiquidSteelHeroRotator.js` — **Hero Headline Rotator**
The animated hero component used on `HomePage.js`. Cycles through three headline variants with crossfade transitions (e.g., "A Single **Intelligence Layer** Across All Business Systems"). Supports manual navigation via arrow buttons and auto-advances every 8 seconds. Includes a `RichText` parser for bold/orange and italic text.

---

## "How BIQc Works" Content

### 6. `frontend/src/components/website/HowItWorks.js` — **How It Works Section**
A consolidated tabbed section merging content from `/platform` and `/intelligence` pages. Contains four tabs: "Why BIQc" (pain points), "How It Works" (6-layer process), "Intelligence Categories" (6 data categories), and "Intelligence Pipeline" (4-step pipeline). All copy is sourced/verified from `PlatformPage.js` and `IntelligencePage.js`.

---

## Supporting Website Components (used on HomePage)

### 7. `frontend/src/components/website/WebsiteLayout.js` — **Website Shell/Layout**
Shared layout for all public website pages. Provides the top navigation bar (with Platform, Intelligence, Integrations, Pricing, Blog, Trust links and a Trust dropdown), mobile menu, and footer.

### 8. `frontend/src/components/website/IntelligenceDiagram.js` — **Architecture Diagram**
An animated vertical diagram showing how business systems (Finance, Operations, Sales) feed into BIQc's intelligence engine. Includes animated connector pulses and expanding capability cards.

### 9. `frontend/src/components/website/IntegrationCarousel.js` — **Scrolling Integration Logos**
Two auto-scrolling rows of brand logo cards (HubSpot, Salesforce, Xero, etc.) shown in the integrations section of the homepage.

### 10. `frontend/src/components/website/EnergyGalaxyBackground.js` — **Canvas Background Animation**
A 2D simplex-noise-based particle/galaxy background effect (canvas). Not currently imported in `HomePage.js` but available as a website visual component.

### 11. `frontend/src/components/website/BrandLogos.js` — **SVG Brand Logo Library**
SVG icon definitions and color mappings for all integration brand logos (HubSpot, Salesforce, Xero, Stripe, etc.). Used by `IntegrationCarousel.js`.

### 12. `frontend/src/components/website/PlatformLayout.js` — **Platform Sub-page Layout**
A sidebar navigation layout for platform detail pages (Overview, Revenue, Operations, etc.). Not directly part of the landing page hero, but part of the website component set.
